title: lycopodium neopungens
intro: Lycopodium neopungens, also known as Lycopodium cernuum, is a type of club moss that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Lycopodium neopungens include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its potential to alleviate digestive problems and skin irritations. Lycopodium neopungens can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
